error.minUI5VersionNotMet: The card generator is only supported for projects with a minimum SAPUI5 version of {{featureVersion}} or higher. The detected minimum SAPUI5 version is {{minUI5Version}}. Update the sap.ui5.minUI5Version property in the manifest.json file and ensure the SAPUI5 version used is {{featureVersion}} or higher.
error.prerequisitesNotMet: Minimum UI5 version requirement for card generator is not met.
